title: Minecraft but There are Elemental Wands
description: This mod adds four elemental wands with their perspective elements ability : Earth , Air , Water , Fire .
body:
This mods add four elemental wands that control their perspective elements . This mod is only for 1.21.1 forge or neoforge . 

**Abilities of Fire wand** : 
_Fireball Cannon_ (Right-click) : shoots a big fireball.
_Fire blast _(Sneak + Right-click) : when near enemy explode and sets them on fire.
_Buff_ : permanent fire resistance.

**Abilities of Water wand** :
_Water Jet_ (Right-click) : shoots a water laser which damages and gives nausea to enemies.
_Water Wave_ (Sneak + Right-click) : shoots a wave that knocks back enemies and gives them slowness.
_Buff_ : permanent dolphin grace and water breathing.

**Abilities of Air wand** : 
_Dash_ (Right-click) : makes you dash forward.
_Air Blast_ (Sneak + Right-click) : pushes and launches  enemies .
_Buff_ : permanent slow falling.

**Abilities of Earth wand** : 
_Spike Throw_ (Right-click) : throws a spike which damages and gives poison.
_Earth Smash_ (Sneak + Right-click) : launches enemies away  from you giving them slowness and giving you regenration.
_Buff_ : permanent resistance.

**Recipe :**
  Recipes are given in gallery but some of you might not understand what is the recipe so i m giving recipe here again.
_Fire wand_ : 2 sticks , 2 blaze powder , 1 lava bucket.
_Water wand_: 2 sticks , 3 water buckets.
_Air wand_ : 2 sticks , 2 white wools , 1 iron.
_Earth wand_ : 2 sticks , any dirt , oak log , oak leave

NOTE : If you dont like this mode please dont show hate because its my first time making any mode.
